taxonomy: Stachygynandrum rubricaule is classified as a species of liverwort in the genus Stachygynandrum, which belongs to the family Lepidolejeuneaceae. This classification suggests that it is a type of non-vascular land plant. The liverworts, including Stachygynandrum rubricaule, are part of the larger division Marchantiophyta. Marchantiophyta, in turn, is a subgroup of the green algae and bryophytes. Further classification of Stachygynandrum rubricaule places it in the phylum Marchantiophyta.
